tasks.task_description: Create workspace plugin architecture: Add loadWorkspaceRoutes() function in voltagent-runtime.ts that scans src-ui/src/workspaces for route exports
Restructure SADashboard as a directory with index.tsx (component), routes.ts (API handlers), and types.ts (shared types)
Port Outlook calendar logic from Python to TypeScript in SADashboard/routes.ts - implement /sa/calendar/events endpoint
Port SFDC logic from Python to TypeScript in SADashboard/routes.ts - implement /sa/meeting/analyze endpoint
Update SADashboard component to fetch from /sa/* endpoints and render calendar view with meeting details
Update workspace registry to support directory-based workspaces with optional route exports

description: Implement plugin architecture for workspace components with backend routes
